dealers.name: Toyota Metro Manila
usps: 10-year powertrain warranty on all new units
Same-day financing approval for pre-qualified buyers
Dedicated after-sales team with 24/7 roadside assistance
Largest Toyota inventory in Metro Manila

promotions.title: Zero Interest June
promotions.details: 0% interest for 24 months with minimum 30% down payment. No processing fee for applications submitted before June 30.

promotions.title: Free PMS Package
promotions.details: Free 3-year or 45,000 km Periodic Maintenance Service package included with every purchase. Valued at PHP 18,000.

promotions.title: Trade-In Bonus
promotions.details: Additional PHP 50,000 trade-in bonus on top of appraised value when you trade in any vehicle model year 2020 or newer.

reviews.author: Juan D.
reviews.text: Very fast processing — got my Vios approved in one afternoon. Staff were friendly and walked me through every step of the financing.

reviews.author: Maria S.
reviews.text: Good experience overall. The sales team was knowledgeable and not pushy. Waiting area could use an upgrade but the service was solid.

reviews.author: Rodel C.
reviews.text: Second car I've bought from this branch. They remembered me from my first purchase three years ago — that kind of relationship matters.

reviews.author: Ana L.
reviews.text: Unit I wanted (Fortuner in black) was out of stock and I had to wait two weeks. Would have appreciated more proactive updates from the team.

reviews.author: Kevin M.
reviews.text: The 10-year powertrain warranty sealed the deal for me. No other dealer in the area offers this. Highly recommended.

dealers.name: Toyota Cebu South
dealers.location: South Road Properties, Cebu City, Cebu
usps: Open 7 days a week including holidays
Fastest vehicle release in Cebu — 3 business days guaranteed
Exclusive Cebu-only hybrid test drive program
On-site insurance processing with partner providers

promotions.title: Hybrid Test Drive Program
promotions.details: Book a free 30-minute Yaris Cross hybrid test drive on our Cebu SRP test route. Participants receive a PHP 10,000 discount voucher valid on any new unit purchase.

promotions.title: Fast Release Guarantee
promotions.details: Guaranteed vehicle release within 3 business days of full payment clearance. If release is delayed beyond 3 days, receive a free 1-year extended warranty.

promotions.title: All-In Down Payment Promo
promotions.details: All chattel mortgage fees, insurance first year, and LTO registration included in down payment. No hidden charges. Valid for in-house financing only.

reviews.author: Sheila T.
reviews.text: Released my Raize in 2 days — faster than they promised. The all-in down payment promo meant no surprise charges at release. Perfect experience.

reviews.author: Noel B.
reviews.text: Nice that they're open on Sundays. Came in on a Sunday morning with no crowds. Sales rep spoke Cebuano which made the whole thing more comfortable.

reviews.author: Carla G.
reviews.text: Did the hybrid test drive program for the Yaris Cross and ended up buying one. The test route actually showed off the EV mode properly — not just a parking lot loop.

reviews.author: Dennis R.
reviews.text: Sales team was friendly but the unit I reserved had a scratch on delivery. Took another 5 days to get a replacement. Process after the problem was good but the initial issue shouldn't have happened.

reviews.author: Liza F.
reviews.text: On-site insurance processing saved me a full day of running around. Everything was done in one branch visit. Will recommend to family.
